since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.63%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.12% · BTC +1.56% · Gold -0.46% · Nasdaq100 -0.02%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.63%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.63%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +5.80%
cards.body: Leaders: META +5.80%, BABA +3.25%, UEC +2.31%, NVDA +2.28%, SYM +2.09%. Laggards: RXRX -5.19%, S -4.45%, INTC -3.13%, MRVL -2.99%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.59% at $148.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
